items.title: Suggestion: add Hanzilla Jobs to Canada job boards
items.description:
Hi — thanks for maintaining this list.

Could you consider adding Hanzilla Jobs to the Canada section?

Suggested entry:

```md
* [Hanzilla Jobs](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/) - Daily-updated Canadian student and recent-grad job board for internships, co-ops, new grad, junior, and entry-level roles across tech, finance, engineering, business, sciences, and more.
```

Why I think it fits:

- It is Canada-specific.
- It is a job board, free to browse.
- It focuses on university students and recent grads across multiple early-career fields, not only software.

Disclosure: I help build/operate Hanzilla Jobs, so please only include it if it fits your curation standards.
